description.value: Each finger in your hand has a different tool. Great for Techs!
Built in agent. Audio only but can be linked with other cybergear.
Records sound. Can link into a chip or agent.
Light version of an Armorjack for your head. No armor penalty.
Light version of an Armorjack. No armor penalty.
A very heavy pistol. It can't be concealed.

information.notes:
Tommy is a Night City native with a talent for tech, who entered SovOil as a fresh face following the 2030s house-cleaning by Silvers the Solo. Lots of dead execs would prove to attract a whole new generation of go-getters who weren't afraid of being shot at from the front or the back.

Tommy popped up on Nikolai's radar when, during routine maintenance on Nikolai's cyberchair, he sabotaged the goods for another exec just before Nikolai went on mission. Nikolai, though, was impressed with Tommy's technical skill and made him an offer after coming back despite the sabotage - cut out the other guy and ride the Tank all the way to the top.

Tommy is self-assured and saccharine, and absolutely unafraid to get his hands dirty doing whatever he needs to do - murder, saborage, blackmail, whatever - to get the job done.
